CLAUDE.md — tabular

Source: CLAUDE.md

TFL rendering for regulatory submissions (RTF / PDF / HTML / LaTeX). Replaces arframe.

Global directives load from ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md. This file holds project-specific shared conventions.

Project state

Fresh repo. Scaffolding TBD.

Conventions

  • snake_case, package prefix on exports.
  • Base R + targeted deps; no tidyverse in Imports.
  • Test-first for new exports. roxygen2 examples must run.
  • air formats after edits.

See build.md for the dev loop. See debugging.md for troubleshooting.

On this page

Developed by Vignesh Thanikachalam.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
